title: strip_control_chars has no test — silent regression risk
description: main.rs::strip_control_chars() filters control characters from message bodies, preserving newlines. It is called in the message render path but has no unit test. A refactor that accidentally changes the newline-preservation behavior (e.g. '\r\n' handling, Unicode control chars like U+0085 NEL, or BOM) would not be caught. The function sits in main.rs which is also harder to unit-test than lib code.
